title: Python Backend Engineer
responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: DataBridge is hiring a junior python backend engineer to support developing backend services, APIs, and data-driven platform features.
raw_text: Vacancy V014: Python Backend Engineer at DataBridge. Location: Lviv. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 0.5 years. Required skills: python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker, aws, redis. Optional skills: rabbitmq, terraform. Responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring.
